gen_py_tool.domain.models module¶

models.py

Info

Defines domain modes representing tool parameters.

class gen_py_tool.domain.models.Tool(params: dict[str, Any])[source]¶

Bases: object

Domain model representing a tool.

It defines:

attributes:
params - The dict of parameters for the tool.
methods:
from_params - Factory method that constructs Tool with parameters.
classmethod from_params(params: dict[str, Any]) → Tool[source]¶

Factory method that constructs Tool with parameters.

Parameters:

params (<dict[str, Any]>) – Parameters for the tool.

Returns:

The generated Tool domain model instance with tool parameters.

Return type:

<Tool>

Exceptions:
ATSValueError: Tool parameters must be provided.
params: dict[str, Any]¶
